overridesNotes.diff: Pinned to 8.0.3 to resolve a low-severity vulnerability present in mocha's transitive diff@^7 dependency.
overridesNotes.ws: Pinned to 8.20.1 (out of the <=8.20.0 vulnerable range) to resolve GHSA-58qx-3vcg-4xpx without forcing a viem upgrade.
overridesNotes.viem: Capped below 2.38.0 for two distinct reasons: (1) From ox 0.13+ (pulled in by viem 2.46+), `_types/core/WebAuthnP256.d.ts` imports from `../webauthn/*` and TypeScript's classic `moduleResolution: "node"` (used by this SDK) ends up loading the raw `.ts` source files at `node_modules/ox/webauthn/*`, which reference browser globals (`window`, `document`) and break the build of `@chorus-one/ethereum` and `@chorus-one/polygon`. (2) viem 2.38+ tightened pre-send chainId validation, which breaks polygon integration tests that point a `mainnet`-configured staker at the local hardhat node (chainId 31337). Lift this cap once (a) ox stops shipping `.ts` source files at the package root or viem decouples its type chain from `WebAuthnP256`, AND (b) the polygon integration tests are updated to align the staker's `chain` with the actual RPC chainId.
